---
title: "About"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    theme: cosmo
---

**Nihal Turan**

::: role-line
Civil Engineer \| Test Engineer \| M.S. in Engineering Management
:::

::: intro-block
I am a civil engineer currently working as a Test Engineer at ENA Tower Testing Station under MİTAŞ Group. This website presents my work for the MUY665 Business Analytics course, together with my academic background and professional experience.
:::

::: action-links
<a class="action-button" href="Nihal_Turan_CV.pdf" target="_blank">Download CV</a> <a class="action-button secondary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nihal-turan-7606781b9" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
:::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: columns-layout
:::::::: left-column
::: section-box
## Profile

Civil engineer with three years of experience as a Test Engineer at ENA Tower Testing Station, working at the field–office interface in Türkiye’s first and only tower testing facility. Experienced in test operations, reporting, process improvement, and technical problem-solving.
:::

::: section-box
## Technical Skills

-   **Engineering Software:** AutoCAD, Tekla, SolidWorks, PLS Tower\
-   **Project & Planning:** Primavera, MS Project\
-   **Business Tools:** SAP, MS Office
:::

::: section-box
## Certifications

-   Project Planning and Control with Primavera P6, AKIM Engineering
:::

::: section-box
## Languages

-   English\
-   German
:::

::: section-box
## Interests

-   Volleyball\
-   Pilates\
-   Stained Glass Art
:::
::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::: right-column
## Education

:::::: entry-block
::: entry-title
B.S. in Civil Engineering
:::

::: entry-subtitle
Çankaya University
:::

::: entry-date
2016 – 2021
:::
::::::

:::::: entry-block
::: entry-title
M.S. in Engineering Management
:::

::: entry-subtitle
Hacettepe University
:::

::: entry-date
2026 – Present
:::
::::::

## Experience

:::::: entry-block
::: entry-title
Test Engineer
:::

::: entry-subtitle
ENA Tower Testing Station, MİTAŞ Group
:::

::: entry-date
2022 – Present
:::
::::::

## Internships

:::::: entry-block
::: entry-title
Intern Civil Engineer
:::

::: entry-subtitle
DSI New Building, Siyahkalem Engineering
:::

::: entry-date
2020
:::
::::::

:::::: entry-block
::: entry-title
Intern Civil Engineer
:::

::: entry-subtitle
Merkez Ankara Project, Pasifik Construction
:::

::: entry-date
2019
:::
::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
